name: Double Orange Scones with Orange Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, 3 tablespoons sugar, baking powder, and orange peel. Using a pastry blender, cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Add orange segments, milk, and beaten egg. Mix with a fork just until the dough forms and no longer falls from the sides of the bowl.
5. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead lightly 10 times.
6. On the prepared cookie sheet, roll or pat the dough into six 6-inch circles. Sprinkle each circle with 1 tablespoon sugar.
7. Cut each circle into 8 wedges; separate slightly.
8. Bake at 400°F for 15-20 minutes.
9. Beat butter in a small bowl until light and fluffy. Stir in marmalade.
10. Serve warm scones (serves 8).
